Name: MAP_VOLUME_FOG_PARAM
Description: Defines volumetric fog properties for map areas, including color, density, and distance falloff settings.

Fields.Name: Red Channel
Fields.Description: Red component of the fog color.

Fields.Name: Green Channel
Fields.Description: Green component of the fog color.

Fields.Name: Blue Channel
Fields.Description: Blue component of the fog color.

Fields.Name: Alpha Channel
Fields.Description: Opacity component of the fog color.

Fields.Name: Fog Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which fog begins to fully affect visibility.

Fields.Name: Fog Density
Fields.Description: Overall intensity or thickness of the fog effect.
